description_long: This house features a modern, boxy architectural design with a flat roof and large, floor-to-ceiling windows on the front facade. The exterior is primarily finished in black and blue panels, with prominent glass surfaces that allow for ample natural light. Green landscaping elements flank both sides of the house, with one side incorporating a sloped green ramp leading up to an outdoor staircase. The upper level includes a balcony and a partially enclosed rooftop area, while the lower level has a recessed entryway and additional glass doors. The structure appears to be constructed from a combination of concrete, glass, and metal, giving it a sleek, contemporary appearance. The overall layout suggests a two-story residence with open, airy living spaces and outdoor access from multiple points.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, large glass windows, and black and blue exterior panels, flanked by green landscaping and featuring a rooftop terrace and outdoor staircase.
description_view_0: Front view showing large glass windows, a recessed entryway, and a balcony above, with green landscaping on both sides.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the outdoor staircase, sloped green ramp, and a mix of glass and solid black panels.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the rooftop terrace, additional windows, and the full extent of the green landscaping.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a clear look at the green ramp, staircase, and a more solid black facade with fewer windows.
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed entryway with glass doors, no porch, flanked by large windows and green landscaping
